text.title: Agency Kickoff Deck Template Core Rules

rule.statement: Deck MUST be ≤12 slides; decks exceeding are rejected.
rule.rationale: Client attention is short; >12 slides loses the decision asks.

rule.statement: Deck MUST include a numbered decision-asks slide at position penultimate; absent slide rejected.
Workstream owners MUST be named humans on both agency and client sides; 'team' or placeholder owner rejected.
rule.rationale: Owner clarity is the leading kickoff hygiene risk.

rule.statement: Risks slide MUST list exactly 5 top risks with owner + trigger; longer lists are rejected.
rule.rationale: Top-5 forces prioritisation; full register doesn't belong in kickoff.

rule.statement: Deck MUST include explicit comms cadence (channel + frequency + owner); absent slide rejected.
rule.rationale: Without comms cadence, clients ping ad-hoc and burn agency hours.
